machine.name: localai/agent_activity_classifier
machine.description: Classifies the LangGraph agent's current turn into one of three activity tiers based on the localai_agent_activity sensor at [64:68]. Structurally parallel to rag_corrective_cycle: reads normalized activity signals and asserts exactly one of productive / normal / struggling on its output window [68:72]. Downstream consumers can observe the classification directly on perceptual space without coupling to agent_graph internals.

routingLogic.productive: tool_calls_norm >= 0.2 AND tool_errors_norm < 0.5 — agent is making progress with tools
routingLogic.struggling: tool_errors_norm >= 0.5 OR reasoning_depth_norm >= 0.8 — high error rate or deep reasoning loop
routingLogic.normal: default (no productive/struggling signal) — idle or light activity
routingLogic.mutualExclusivity: productive and struggling are partitioned by the tool_errors_norm split; normal fires when neither matches

sequences.name: Productive: tool_calls HIGH AND tool_errors LOW

metadata.description: Fires when the agent has made at least one tool call and errors stay below the midpoint.
agent productive — tool calls happening with low error rate

metadata.name: PRODUCTIVE_CHECK
metadata.description: element[0]: tool_calls_norm HIGH (>=0.2); element[1]: tool_errors_norm LOW (<0.5, GTE split at 0.5 with value=0)

sequences.name: Struggling: tool_errors HIGH OR reasoning_depth HIGH

metadata.description: Fires when the agent hits repeated tool errors. The reasoning-depth leg is covered by a second initial vector in this sequence so either signal triggers it (OR semantics within sequence via two initial vectors).
agent struggling — tool errors above midpoint
agent struggling — deep reasoning loop without resolution

sequences.name: Normal: no tool calls (idle / light activity)

metadata.description: Fires when tool_calls_norm is LOW — default state when the agent is either idle or just emitting reasoning without tool invocation. Mutually exclusive with productive via the tool_calls_norm split.
agent normal — idle or pure-reasoning turn

metadata.name: NORMAL_CHECK
metadata.description: All activity signals LOW (tool_calls<0.2, tool_errors<0.5, reasoning_depth<0.8)

inputSequences.name: Productive turn — 2 tool calls, no errors
inputSequences.description: Agent invoked 2 tools (norm=0.4) with no errors and moderate reasoning (3 steps). Should assert productive [1,0,0,0].

metadata.notes: tool_calls=0.4 (>=0.2 HIGH), tool_errors=0.0 (<0.5 LOW) → productive fires

inputSequences.name: Struggling turn — repeated tool errors
inputSequences.description: Agent tried 3 tools but 2 errored (norm=0.67). Should assert struggling [0,0,1,0] via the errors leg.

inputSequences.name: Struggling turn — deep reasoning without tools
inputSequences.description: Agent has looped through 9 reasoning steps without tool calls — likely stuck. Should assert struggling [0,0,1,0] via the depth leg.

inputSequences.name: Normal turn — no tool calls, shallow reasoning
inputSequences.description: Agent emitted a quick reasoning-only response. Should assert normal [0,1,0,0].
